introSection: Bullet Train (Chinese: 子弹列车) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Gingko Lake Amusement Park in Jiangning, Nanjing, Jiangsu, China. The coaster originally opened at Kurashiki Tivoli Park in Kurashiki, Okayama, Japan as Odin Express (Japanese: オーディンエクスプレス).

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and dark green supports. The ride used to feature white track and supports.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Bullet Train on the park's website (in Chinese)

fullText:
Bullet Train (Chinese: 子弹列车) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Gingko Lake Amusement Park in Jiangning, Nanjing, Jiangsu, China. The coaster originally opened at Kurashiki Tivoli Park in Kurashiki, Okayama, Japan as Odin Express (Japanese: オーディンエクスプレス).



Red track and dark green supports. The ride used to feature white track and supports.




 * Bullet Train on the park's website (in Chinese)
